proposal1.heroHeadline: KBD is losing hundreds of hours annually on manual proposals. Here is how to stop it.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Manually crafting proposals takes hours. With our system, generate them in 47 seconds.
proposal1.problemsIntro: These are the ongoing losses KBD faces with its current proposal process.

problems.title: Time Drain
problems.description: Kevin, every hour spent writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. With a team of 2, this is critical.

problems.title: Lost Deals
problems.description: Delayed proposals mean lost opportunities. Each day a proposal is late, the prospect cools off, costing you potential clients.

problems.title: Brand Inconsistency
problems.description: Manually ensuring brand consistency is tough. Inconsistent proposals can confuse prospects and weaken your brand perception.

problems.title: High Labor Cost
problems.description: The time you and your partner spend on proposals is costly. Every hour could be spent on high-value tasks, like strategy and client relations.

problems.title: Stress and Burnout
problems.description: Endless proposal creation leads to fatigue. This impacts your creativity and effectiveness in delivering marketing and advertising services.

problems.title: Competitive Disadvantage
problems.description: While competitors streamline their processes, manual proposals slow you down. This can make you appear less efficient to prospects.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system replaces all these inefficiencies with streamlined automation.

solutions.title: Instant Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, proposals take hours of manual labor. Our system generates a complete, branded proposal in under 60 seconds.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Ensuring brand consistency is manual. Our AI ensures every proposal aligns perfectly with your brand guidelines.

solutions.title: Real-Time Tracking
solutions.description: Currently, you lack insight into proposal engagement. Our system provides real-time tracking, so you know when to follow up.

solutions.title: AI Chatbot Integration
solutions.description: Manual follow-ups can be delayed. The integrated chatbot engages prospects instantly, keeping their interest alive.

solutions.title: Cost Efficiency
solutions.description: High labor costs cut into profits. Our system reduces time spent on proposals, allowing focus on revenue-generating activities.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for KBD's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for KBD around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for KBD.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Transforming Acme Corp's Brand Presence with KBD's Expertise
proposal2.heroSubheadline: We propose a comprehensive marketing strategy that enhances your brand and drives measurable growth.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is currently facing significant revenue losses due to underperforming marketing efforts.

problems.title: Low Conversion Rates
problems.description: Every visitor leaving your site without converting is potential revenue lost. This can amount to thousands in missed opportunities each month.

problems.title: Weak Brand Recognition
problems.description: Poor brand visibility is costing you market share. Competitors with stronger branding are capturing your potential customers.

problems.title: Ineffective Social Media
problems.description: Without engaging social media content, you're losing followers and potential leads. This results in a declining customer base.

problems.title: Poor Search Rankings
problems.description: Being buried in search results means losing countless clicks to competitors. This diminishes your online presence and sales potential.

problems.title: Stagnant Lead Generation
problems.description: A lack of fresh leads means your sales pipeline is drying up. This stagnation directly impacts your revenue growth.

problems.title: Inefficient Ad Spend
problems.description: Unoptimized advertising campaigns lead to wasted budget. Every dollar not effectively spent is a dollar lost.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our tailored solutions address these critical issues, turning losses into gains.

solutions.title: Brand Strategy Development
solutions.description: We will elevate your brand identity, making it recognizable and memorable. This will enhance your market position.

solutions.title: SEO Optimization
solutions.description: Improving your search rankings will increase visibility and drive more traffic to your site, boosting conversion rates.

solutions.title: Social Media Management
solutions.description: Engaging and consistent social media content will grow your following and convert leads into customers.

solutions.title: Ad Campaign Optimization
solutions.description: Optimizing your ad spend will ensure every dollar works harder, leading to higher ROI and lower costs.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: KBD offers unparalleled expertise and a proven track record.

whyUsCards.title: Experienced Team
whyUsCards.description: Our team has successfully transformed brands across various industries with tailored strategies.

whyUsCards.title: Data-Driven Decisions
whyUsCards.description: We use data to drive every decision, ensuring your campaigns are optimized for success.

whyUsCards.title: Client-Centric Approach
whyUsCards.description: Your success is our priority. We work closely with you to achieve your business goals.

whyUsCards.title: Comprehensive Services
whyUsCards.description: From branding to digital marketing, we offer a full suite of services to meet your needs.

socialProof.label: Awards and recognitions in the industry.

proposal2.teamIntro: Our dedicated team is here to support your success.

team.name: Kevin Brown
team.bio: Kevin leads strategy and client relationships with a focus on delivering measurable results. His experience ensures clients receive top-tier service.

proposal2.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Discovery & Strategy
process.description: We start by understanding your business and market.

process.title: Implementation
process.description: We develop and implement customized strategies.

process.title: Optimization

process.title: Review & Growth
